message:
feat: LISR-5.1 structural validation gate + LISR-2.1 intent graph + LISR-2.2 tolerant parse

- StructuralVerdict enum + validate_repaired_artifact() gates dist→src repair
  on parse/type/extension checks (SWC for TS/TSX, serde for JSON)
- IntentGraph + IntentSignal extract normalized intent from RegisterPayload
  (tools, commands, shortcuts, flags, hooks, capabilities)
- TolerantParseResult + AmbiguitySignal for partial AST recovery and
  ambiguity detection (eval, dynamic import, star re-export, Proxy, etc.)
- Wired structural validation into try_dist_to_src_fallback (continue on
  failure to try next candidate)
- 17 new structural validation tests + 12 intent graph tests + 17 tolerant
  parse tests = 46 new tests (172 total in file)

Beads: bd-k5q5.9.5.1, bd-k5q5.9.2.1, bd-k5q5.9.2.2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
